description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of gable and flat roof sections, set on a rectangular plot with striped landscaping. The structure is primarily composed of two main volumes, one with a steeply pitched roof and the other with a lower, flat roof, connected by a central corridor. The exterior showcases a mix of dark and light materials, likely metal and wood, with large windows and a covered entryway. Mature trees are planted around the perimeter, providing natural shade and privacy. The driveway leads to a sheltered carport area adjacent to the main entrance. The overall layout emphasizes clean lines, open space, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern bungalow with gable and flat roofs, dark and light exterior materials, large windows, and a striped landscaped yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a clear view of the gable and flat roof sections.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the striped landscaping, tree placement, and the overall building footprint.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, deck area, and the transition between roof types.
description_view_3: Top-rear view emphasizing the tree coverage and the relationship between the house and its landscaped plot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
